name: Corn Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 2 tablespoons cornstarch with 2 tbsp water to form a smooth paste.
2. Add the mixture to the can of cream-style corn (or 2-3 ears of fresh corn if available).
3. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs and combine them with 3 cups canned milk, 1 tablespoon sugar, and salt to taste.
4. Pour the egg mixture into the corn mixture.
5. Grease a casserole or flat pan.
6. Bake in a slow oven at 300 degrees Fahrenheit until the consistency is that of custard (about 50-60 minutes), ensuring the knife inserted comes out clean when tested.
